title: Motorised Longboard
description: Designed and built an electric longboard using a brushless DC motor, ESC, and lithium battery pack. The board can reach 25 km/h and has a 15 km range on a single charge.
materials_or_tech: Maple plywood deck, brushless 5065 motor, VESC ESC, 10Ah LiPo battery, polyurethane wheels, 3D-printed motor mount
outcome: Fully functional electric longboard capable of carrying a rider and operating safely on flat surfaces. Tested over 50 km of travel.

title: Student Timetable App
description: A cross-platform mobile app that allows students to organise their class schedules, set homework reminders, and track assignment due dates.
materials_or_tech: React Native, Expo, Firebase Firestore, Firebase Auth, Expo Notifications
outcome: Published app available for iOS and Android. Used by 40+ students at school for timetable management during trial period.

title: Automatic Plant Watering System
description: An IoT system that monitors soil moisture levels and automatically waters plants when the moisture drops below a set threshold. Includes a web dashboard for monitoring.
materials_or_tech: Arduino Uno, capacitive soil moisture sensors, 5V water pump, relay module, PVC tubing, acrylic enclosure
outcome: Successfully maintained optimal soil moisture for a herb garden over 4 weeks. Reduced water usage by an estimated 30% compared to manual watering.

title: School Event Booking Website
description: A web platform for students to browse and register for school events such as sports days, cultural events, and workshops. Includes admin controls for event management.
materials_or_tech: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, Tailwind CSS, Vercel
outcome: Live website used for school sports day registration. Processed 200+ registrations without issues.

title: Wind-Powered Phone Charger
description: A compact wind turbine designed to charge mobile phones in remote or off-grid environments. The turbine uses a vertical-axis design for omnidirectional wind capture.
materials_or_tech: PVC pipe, aluminium sheet, stepper motor repurposed as generator, bridge rectifier, voltage regulator, ABS plastic housing
outcome: Prototype generates up to 5W at 15 km/h wind speed, sufficient to charge a phone at 0.5A. Currently undergoing durability testing.

title: AI Flashcard Generator
description: A web app that uses AI to automatically generate study flashcards from uploaded notes or textbook PDFs. Students can review cards using spaced repetition.
materials_or_tech: React, OpenAI API, PDF.js, Supabase, Vite
outcome: Early prototype successfully extracts key concepts from PDF documents and formats them as flashcards. UI in development.
